invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger queries[j]} {:trigger results[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: results[j] == MinCost(queries[j].0, queries[j].1, queries[j].2)

ensures.text: forall i: int {:trigger queries[i]} {:trigger results[i]} | 0 <= i < |queries| :: results[i] == MinCost(queries[i].0, queries[i].1, queries[i].2)
forall i: int {:trigger queries[i]} {:trigger results[i]} | 0 <= i < |queries| :: results[i] == MinCost(queries[i].0, queries[i].1, queries[i].2)

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger queries[i]} | 0 <= i < |queries| :: queries[i].0 >= 0
forall i: int {:trigger queries[i]} | 0 <= i < |queries| :: queries[i].0 >= 0
